title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist is an AI system that automates medical discoveries by identifying potential treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. The system uses a self-ranking mechanism and outperforms human experts in drug discovery applications including leukemia treatments and antibiotic resistance solutions.
